meta.title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Nyah Macklin: How to Structure Context to Make Your Agents Smarter
meta.description:
When agents fail at complex tasks, the problem is rarely the model itself— it's the lack of a proper context that is required for complex reasoning. Retrieving similar documents isn't enough when agents need to understand how entities relate, how knowledge connects across domains, or how information chains together to answer multi-step questions. 

In this session, Nyah Macklin, Sr. Developer Advocate at Neo4j, dove into a deliberate approach to context engineering. Attendees learned how to model information with explicit relationships, how to design retrieval patterns for agents that follow knowledge pathways, and how to build memory systems that preserve the connections sophisticated agentic reasoning demands.

----------------

Join us at AI Dev 26 x San Francisco! Tickets: https://ai-dev.deeplearning.ai/
